The '''Class-J cargo container''' was a large box-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The Class-J container was the largest available container in the [[Xizor cargo container]] line and was designed to store assembled items. The immense size of the container prohibited many [[Light freighter/Legends|smaller freighters]] from carrying the container; instead, larger [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] were required to transport them. Additionally, both [[Virella Systems cargo freighter|cargo freighters]] and [[cargo tanker]]s could include them in their linked payloads.<ref name="XWA" />

The size of the Class-J container also provided ample space to function as a [[Space station/Legends|space station]], and a [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|cannon]] could be mounted on the exterior.<ref name="XWA" />
